# agentops_skills (Data Source)

The skills available to this account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "agentops_skills" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `skills` (Attributes List) Available skills. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--skills))

<a id="nestedatt--skills"></a>
### Nested Schema for `skills`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description.
- `md5` (String) MD5 checksum of the skill.
- `name` (String) Display name.
- `path` (String) Path of the skill.
- `skill_id` (String) Skill identifier.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags associated with the skill.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp of the last update.
- `version` (String) Version of the skill.
